login.title: Real Estate CRM
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

errors.firstNameMinLength: First name must be at least 2 characters
errors.lastNameMinLength: Last name must be at least 2 characters
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordPattern: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, and a number

forgotPassword.title: Reset Your Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: If your email is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Please check your spam folder if you don't see the email
forgotPassword.googleHint: Normally sign in with Google? A password set here is an addition — signing in with Google keeps working.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and number
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Where your business stands
analytics.tooFewTitle: Not enough data yet for a meaningful analysis
analytics.tooFewBody: Once you've logged more clients and calls, these charts will become meaningful.
analytics.funnelSub: Where your prospects drop off on the way to a deal. The stage marked red loses the most.
analytics.noActivityData: No activity in the last 30 days yet
analytics.longestSub: When a listing lingers, it's time for a price talk with the owner.
analytics.mapSub: All properties and client search locations at a glance
analytics.mapClickHint: Click a pin to open the record.
analytics.mapEmpty: No property or client has coordinates yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Manage your clients, properties, and communications efficiently.
dashboard.statisticsDescription: View comprehensive CRM statistics and reports.
dashboard.allClearMessage: No overdue callbacks and no viewings today.
dashboard.emptyStateMessage: Add your first client and your dashboard will fill up with follow-ups, viewings, and a pipeline overview.
dashboard.markInactiveMessage: {{name}} will be removed from this overview and the active client list, and marked "Lost". Their data is kept — you can find them again via the client filter "Lost".

clients.title: Clients
clients.listDescription: A list of all your clients including their contact information and preferences.

import.title: Import Clients from CSV
import.subtitle: Add multiple leads at once, e.g. contacts collected at a trade fair.
import.formatOptional: Optional columns: email, phone, addressStreet, addressCity, addressPostalCode, clientType (BUYER/RENTER/SELLER).
import.dropHint: Drag a CSV file here or click to choose one

clients.marketingConsentFilterHint: Filter by marketing consent — relevant e.g. before sending a newsletter.
clients.incompleteFilterHint: Only show clients with no contact method (email/phone) or no search criteria
clients.addSubtitle: Enter contact details and search criteria for a new client.
clients.editSubtitle: Update this client's contact details and search criteria.
clients.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this client? This action cannot be undone.
clients.duplicateWarningTitle: Possibly already exists — please check before saving:
clients.confirmWonMessage: {{name}} will be marked as a successful close and removed from the active pipeline.
clients.confirmLostMessage: {{name}} will be removed from the active pipeline. Their data is kept — you can find them again via the client filter "Lost".
clients.deleteError: Failed to delete client. Please try again.
clients.name: Name
clients.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
clients.clientTypeHint: Determines whether purchase price or rent fields are shown in the search profile.

searchCriteria.minMaxError: Minimum value must be less than maximum value
searchCriteria.restrictToRadius: Only show properties within the search radius
searchCriteria.restrictToRadiusHint: Turn off to also allow properties outside the radius in matching (scored lower).

clients.gdprConsentText: Client agrees to be contacted for marketing purposes (e.g. property listings, newsletter)

legalBasis.label: Legal Basis for Data Processing
legalBasis.hint: A prospect can be created without consent as long as one of these legal bases applies. The separate consent below is only required for marketing contact.

clients.callNotesDescription: Get started by documenting your first interaction with this client.

hints.title: Tips
hints.gdpr: Choose the legal basis for processing. Marketing consent is optional and only needed for promotional contact (e.g. newsletters).
hints.searchCriteria: Define search criteria for automatic matching with suitable properties.
hints.matching: After saving, matching properties will be suggested automatically.

clients.expectedCommissionHint: Feeds the pipeline total per column. Can be filled in from the prospect stage onwards.

properties.title: Properties
properties.newSubtitle: Fill in all relevant fields and save the property.
properties.editSubtitle: Changes are automatically saved as a draft.
properties.deleteFailed: Failed to delete. Please try again.

notes.title: Internal note
notes.empty: No note yet — click to add one.
notes.placeholder: Internal note… e.g. 'Seller is flexible on price', 'Owner wants to close by end of Q3'

properties.noPropertiesHint: Add your first property to get started.

form.title: Property Title
form.ownerSectionHint: Internal data — not visible in the exposé
form.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields correctly.
form.validationFailedFields: Validation failed for the following field(s): {{fields}}. Please check the highlighted fields below.

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this property?

search.title: Advanced Property Search
search.description: Search properties with advanced filtering options
search.queryPlaceholder: Search by title, description, or address...
search.noResults: No properties found matching your criteria.

matching.title: Property Matching
matching.subtitle: Find the best matches between clients and properties
matching.alreadyContactedHint: A viewing already exists linking this contact to this property.

images.title: Images
images.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop images here or click
images.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
images.allowedTypes: Allowed formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF
images.errorInvalidType: Invalid file type. Only JPEG, PNG, GIF, and WebP images are allowed.
images.errorSizeExceeded: File size exceeds the maximum limit of 50MB.
images.errorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred while uploading images.
images.errorInvalidImageData: Invalid image file or data. Please check the file format and size (max 10MB).
images.errorAuthentication: Authentication error. Please log in again.
images.errorNoPermission: You do not have permission to upload images for this property.
images.errorPropertyNotFound: Property not found. Please refresh the page and try again.
images.errorFileTooLargeHttp: File size too large. Maximum file size is 10MB per image.
images.errorUnsupportedFormatHttp: Unsupported file format. Please use JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP images.
images.errorServerConfig: Server error occurred. Please contact support if the problem persists.
images.errorServiceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
images.errorSetPrimaryFailed: Failed to set primary image. Please try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.postalCode5DigitsOrEmpty: Postal code must be 5 digits or empty.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
validation.passwordPattern: Password must contain uppercase and lowercase letters and a number.
validation.contentTypeImage: The file must be an image.
validation.firstNameLength: First name must be between 2 and 100 characters.
validation.lastNameLength: Last name must be between 2 and 100 characters.
validation.titleLength: Title must be between 5 and 200 characters.
validation.subjectLength: Subject must be between 5 and 200 characters.
validation.streetMaxLength: Street address must not exceed 200 characters.
validation.houseNumberMaxLength: House number must not exceed 20 characters.
validation.phoneMaxLength: Phone number must not exceed 20 characters.
validation.ownerNameMaxLength: Owner name must not exceed 100 characters.
validation.ownerPhoneMaxLength: Owner phone must not exceed 20 characters.
validation.contactPhoneMaxLength: Contact phone must not exceed 20 characters.
validation.virtualTourMaxLength: Virtual tour URL must not exceed 500 characters.
validation.notesLength: Notes must be between 10 and 5000 characters.
validation.followUpMaxLength: Follow-up action must not exceed 500 characters.
validation.transcriptLength: Transcript must be between 10 and 5000 characters.
validation.energyClassMaxLength: Energy efficiency class must not exceed 10 characters.
validation.fileNameMaxLength: File name must not exceed 255 characters.
validation.altTextMaxLength: Alt text must not exceed 500 characters.
validation.priceMax: Price exceeds the maximum allowed value.
validation.pricePerSqmNonNegative: Price per sqm must not be negative.
validation.livingAreaPositive: Living area must be greater than 0.
validation.livingAreaMax: Living area must not exceed 10,000 sqm.
validation.totalAreaPositive: Total area must be greater than 0.
validation.totalAreaMax: Total area must not exceed 100,000 sqm.
validation.plotAreaPositive: Plot area must be greater than 0.
validation.plotAreaMax: Plot area must not exceed 1,000,000 sqm.
validation.floorNumberMin: Floor number must be at least -5 (basement).
validation.constructionYearMin: Construction year must be at least 1000.
validation.renovationYearMin: Last renovation year must be at least 1000.
validation.renovationYearMax: Last renovation year must not exceed 3000.
validation.heatingCostsNonNegative: Heating costs must not be negative.
validation.additionalCostsNonNegative: Additional costs must not be negative.
validation.energyConsumptionNonNegative: Energy consumption must not be negative.
validation.energyConsumptionMax: Energy consumption must not exceed 1000 kWh/m²a.
validation.searchRadiusMin: Search radius must be at least 1 km.
validation.searchRadiusMax: Search radius must not exceed 200 km.
validation.minSquareMetersMin: Minimum size must be at least 10 sqm.
validation.maxSquareMetersMax: Maximum size must not exceed 10,000 sqm.
validation.minRoomsMin: Minimum rooms must be at least 1.
validation.maxRoomsMin: Maximum rooms must be at least 1.
validation.minBudgetPositive: Minimum budget must be greater than 0.
validation.maxBudgetPositive: Maximum budget must be greater than 0.
validation.minColdRentPositive: Minimum cold rent must be greater than 0.
validation.maxColdRentPositive: Maximum cold rent must be greater than 0.
validation.minWarmRentPositive: Minimum warm rent must be greater than 0.
validation.maxWarmRentPositive: Maximum warm rent must be greater than 0.
validation.fileSize10MB: The file must not exceed 10 MB.
